params.name: Gumball Statue
params.description: In the battle between Earth's Will and the Demon Gods, a surge of raw power tore open a rift in the fabric of reality. Through this cosmic tear stumbled a crew of rotund adventurers, each one more unique than the last. They called themselves the Gumballs. Choosing sides in a war of cosmic proportions, some of the Gumballs pledged allegiance to Earth's Will and embarked on daring missions. As a token of eternal gratitude, Earth's Will commissioned statues to be sculpted in their honor, ensuring t …
